MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2020 - NATHAN SENDEROVICH, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER AT TRIAL CALL. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE BECAUSE THEIR WITNESS, WHO IS FROM THE EAST COAST, IS UNABLE TO COME OUT HERE PERSONALLY. THE COURT DENIED THE CONTINUANCE REQUEST AND SET A DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING ON AUG-31-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 514, BEFORE THE HONORABLE GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. THE COURT ORDERED ALL PARTIES PRESENT INCLUDING THE EAST COAST WITNESS, HOWEVER INDICATED TO COUNSEL THAT HE MAY INQUIRE WITH JUDGE SANDOVAL IF HE IS AGREEABLE TO ANY TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-31-2020 10:00 AM FOR DEPT 514

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON AUG-31-2020 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. PROPOSED JUDGMENT WAS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3680. EMAIL: GCASEY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Puthucode Veeraraghavan on August 24, 2020, and continued to today, August 31, 2020.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kristen P. Sleezer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
George Garcia, Custodian of Records for Bank of America, N.A., was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Garcia appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Puthucode Veeraraghavan.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract/Common Counts was filed on June 24, 2019.
Defendant's answer to the complaint was filed on July 29, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on April 1, 2020, setting trial for June 1, 2020.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Trial Order was served on June 2, 2020, setting trial for August 24, 2020.
Department 206 continued this matter to today, August 31, 2020.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed on July 28, 2020.
Plaintiff's Notice of Date, Time and Place of Prove-Up Hearing was filed and served on August 26, 2020.
DOE defendants dismissed today, August 31, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendant Puthucode Veeraraghavan, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $28,513.93 (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $544.66.

Total - $29,058.59.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
